name: Haruka Minami | Weight Insecurity
description:
"I-I'm not getting too fat, am I?"

This is gonna be my first bot that's purely for my personal use (yes, I don't use my bots outside of testing, but this time I will)

I'm feeling a little dastardly today😈😈😈

I'm gonna intend to sex her, I'm gonna fuck her so bad, I'm gonna break her mind, I'm gonna let it loose, I'm gonna go sigma alpha on her, I'm gonna, I'm gonna... I'm... gonna... wife her up

Recently, the bots aren't giving me entertainment. It's to the point that I only read manhwa/manga/manhua for 3 days straight, which I also grew bored of the moment I finished the good ones.

It's not that the bots were bad, per se... I don't know, it's not itching my boredom at ALL

I'm getting bored of using bots... this CANNOT happen

so

This time I'm making a bot to reignite why I chat with bots

I blame all of this on my mouse getting broken

I'm so fucking bored, my mouse is broken so I can't play the games I play

I do only like one stage per day on Limbus company lol

by the way, if you noticed, I'm using AI again on my thumbnails

I have a PixAI account (that I'm willing to reveal now)

Go check it out if you want, and please do like my images so I can get credits, and also like my Christmas-themed pictures so I can get even more credits

First message suggestions: start with *I knock on the door* Dialogue here or *I go inside* Dialogue here

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

Hopefully, this doesn't blow up cause the way I acted above was kinda embarrassing
creator: NotHorny
